bupt.ta.service

类 ApplicationTimelineService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.ApplicationTimelineService

  • public class ApplicationTimelineService
extends java.lang.Object
    Helper for writing application audit timeline events consistently. Event type constants match values stored in ApplicationEvent.getEventType().

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static java.lang.String TYPE_AUTO_PROMOTED
      Waitlisted applicant auto-promoted to selected.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_DECISION_RECORDED
      Final select/reject decision recorded.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_EVALUATION_SAVED
      MO saved interview evaluation.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_INTERVIEW_BOOKED
      TA booked an interview slot.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_INTERVIEW_CANCELLED
      TA cancelled a booked interview slot.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_INTERVIEW_NOTICE
      Interview notice sent to applicant.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED
      Status transition recorded on an application.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_SUBMITTED
      Application submitted by TA.
      static java.lang.String TYPE_WITHDRAWN
      TA withdrew the application.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      ApplicationTimelineService() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      void record(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String actorUserId, java.lang.String actorName, java.lang.String actorRole, java.lang.String eventType, java.lang.String title, java.lang.String detail, java.lang.String fromStatus, java.lang.String toStatus)
      Appends one timeline event for an application.
      void recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String actorUserId, java.lang.String actorName, java.lang.String actorRole, java.lang.String fromStatus, java.lang.String toStatus, java.lang.String detail)
      Records a TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    • 构造器详细资料

      • ApplicationTimelineService

        public ApplicationTimelineService()

    • 方法详细资料

      • record

        public void record(DataStorage storage,
                   Application app,
                   Job job,
                   java.lang.String actorUserId,
                   java.lang.String actorName,
                   java.lang.String actorRole,
                   java.lang.String eventType,
                   java.lang.String title,
                   java.lang.String detail,
                   java.lang.String fromStatus,
                   java.lang.String toStatus)
            throws java.io.IOException
        Appends one timeline event for an application.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - related job (unused, reserved for callers)
        actorUserId - acting user id
        actorName - acting user display name
        actorRole - TA, MO, ADMIN, or SYSTEM
        eventType - TYPE_SUBMITTED and related constants
        title - short event title
        detail - optional longer detail
        fromStatus - previous status (may be empty)
        toStatus - new status (may be empty)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if persistence fails

      • recordStatusChange

        public void recordStatusChange(DataStorage storage,
                               Application app,
                               Job job,
                               java.lang.String actorUserId,
                               java.lang.String actorName,
                               java.lang.String actorRole,
                               java.lang.String fromStatus,
                               java.lang.String toStatus,
                               java.lang.String detail)
                        throws java.io.IOException
        Records a TYPE_STATUS_CHANGED timeline event.
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if persistence fails
